name: Diabetic Devil's Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together cocoa and boiling water until smooth. Set aside to cool to room temperature.
2. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and sugar at low speed for about 1 minute to blend.
3. Add egg substitute, sweetener, and vanilla to the cocoa mixture and mix well.
4. Gradually add margarine to the dry ingredients along with the cocoa mixture and mix at medium speed for about 1 minute.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch square or 9x13 cake pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes, or until a cake tester comes out clean and the cake pulls away from the sides of the pan.
7. Allow to cool in the pan before cutting into slices (6x3) to yield 18 pieces.
